title: Reported Speech — backshift и пары
description: Сдвиг времён, обстоятельства, reporting verbs — ключевые соответствия прямая → косвенная.

cards.back: Present Simple → Past Simple. «I work here» → He said he worked there. Глагол на шаг назад.
Present Continuous → Past Continuous. «I am working» → He said he was working. am/is/are → was/were.
Present Perfect → Past Perfect. «I have finished» → She said she had finished. have/has → had.
Past Simple → Past Perfect. «I worked yesterday» → He said he had worked the day before. V2 → had + V3.
will → would. «I will help» → He said he would help. Future в reported почти всегда would.
can → could. «I can swim» → He said he could swim. could уже backshifted, дальше не сдвигается.
must (обязанность) → had to. «I must leave» → He said he had to leave. Обязанность в прошлом — had to.
must (дедукция) НЕ сдвигается, остаётся must. «He must be tired» → She said he must be tired. Догадка по признакам — без сдвига.
may (возможность) → might. «It may rain» → He said it might rain. may → might для возможности.
tomorrow → the next day / the following day. «I'll come tomorrow» → He said he would come the next day.
yesterday → the day before / the previous day. «I saw her yesterday» → He said he had seen her the day before.
today → that day; tonight → that night. «I'll call tonight» → She said she would call that night.
now → then. «I am busy now» → He said he was busy then. Момент-сейчас сдвигается в момент-тогда.
here → there; this → that; these → those. «I live here, in this flat» → He said he lived there, in that flat. Место и указатели — на шаг назад.
say — без объекта (He said that...). tell — с объектом обязательно (He told me that...). Нельзя «He said me», нельзя «He told that».
asked (obj) + if / whether + S + V (прямой порядок, без do/does/did, без `?`). «Are you ready?» → He asked if I was ready.
asked (obj) + wh-word + S + V (прямой порядок, без do/does/did, без `?`). «Where do you live?» → He asked where I lived.
Положительный: told/asked/advised + obj + to + V. «Wait» → He told me to wait. Отрицательный: + not to + V. «Don't be late» → He told me not to be late.
